items.title: Tracking Metrics
items.description: MLflow `log_metric` and W&B `wandb.log` persist the numeric scores you choose to monitor (loss, F1, AUC). Tracking Metrics defines which metrics matter and how to interpret them; this topic owns the tool calls that record them on each run.

items.title: Versioning Experiments
items.description: Run IDs, tags, and registry promotion are concepts in Versioning Experiments; MLflow and W&B supply the concrete APIs and UIs (run search, compare, register_model, W&B model registry). Tool-specific workflows live here.

items.title: Reproducibility and Seeds
items.description: Reproducible comparisons require logging seed, git commit, and data snapshot as params or config on every run. Reproducibility and Seeds explains why; this topic shows how to capture those fields in MLflow and W&B.

items.title: Train/Val/Test Splits
items.description: Logged `val_f1` and `test_f1` are only comparable across runs when the same split policy and seed were used. Train/Val/Test Splits defines fair splits; log split params on each run so comparison tables are not misleading.
